title: Constraining the Molecular Kennicutt-Schmidt Relation with Multi-Transition CO Observations of Nearby Galaxies
comment: Accepted for publication in ApJ, 5 figures, 13 pages
summary: The relationship between the star formation rate surface density and the molecular gas surface density in galaxies is key to understanding galaxy evolution. To investigate the molecular Kennicutt-Schmidt (K-S) relation and its dependence on gas density, we analyze a uniform sample of 36 nearby galaxies from the AMISS survey, focusing on the CO(1-0), CO(2-1), and CO(3-2) transitions, which trace progressively denser and warmer molecular gas. Using statistical methods that combine binning with Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) fitting, we derive the slope, scatter, and intercept of the $Σ_{\mathrm{SFR}}$-$Σ_{\mathrm{CO}}$ relation for each transition. We find power-law slopes of 1.26, 1.14, and 1.07 for CO(1-0), CO(2-1), and CO(3-2), respectively, consistent with a trend toward increasingly linear star formation relations at higher-J transitions. This behavior supports the idea that denser gas is more directly linked to ongoing star formation and is consistent with previous findings of near-linear correlations between HCN or high-J CO luminosities and global SFR. The observed trend suggests an underlying relation between gas and SFR volume densities with a power-law index of $\sim$1.5, indicating enhanced star formation efficiency in denser environments. These findings underscore the critical role of dense gas in regulating star formation and highlight the importance of tracer selection and excitation conditions when interpreting the K-S relation across different environments.

AI.tldr: 该研究分析了36个邻近星系中恒星形成率面密度与分子气体面密度的关系，发现随着CO跃迁能级增高（对应更密更热的气体），K-S关系斜率趋近于线性，表明稠密气体与恒星形成有更直接的关联。
AI.motivation: 研究星系中恒星形成率面密度与分子气体面密度的关系（K-S关系）及其对气体密度的依赖性，对于理解星系演化至关重要。通过分析不同CO跃迁（追踪不同密度和温度的分子气体），可以揭示稠密气体在恒星形成中的特殊作用。
AI.method: 使用AMISS巡天的36个邻近星系的均匀样本，分析CO(1-0)、CO(2-1)和CO(3-2)三种跃迁（分别追踪逐渐增密增温的分子气体）。采用结合分箱和马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛（MCMC）拟合的统计方法，推导每个跃迁的Σ_SFR-Σ_CO关系的斜率、散射和截距。
AI.result: 发现CO(1-0)、CO(2-1)和CO(3-2)的幂律斜率分别为1.26、1.14和1.07，表明随着更高J跃迁，恒星形成关系趋于线性。这一趋势支持稠密气体与正在进行的恒星形成有更直接联系的观点，并与先前发现的HCN或高J CO光度与全局SFR之间近乎线性的相关性一致。观测趋势暗示气体体积密度与SFR体积密度之间存在幂律指数约1.5的基本关系，表明在更稠密环境中恒星形成效率增强。
AI.conclusion: 稠密气体在调控恒星形成中起着关键作用，强调了在解释不同环境中的K-S关系时，示踪剂选择和激发条件的重要性。这些发现深化了对星系中恒星形成过程的理解。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究邻近星系的分子K-S关系，属于星系形成与演化的一般性课题。虽然涉及分子气体和恒星形成，但研究对象是z~0的邻近星系，与用户核心兴趣（高红移星系、强引力透镜、宇宙正午）不直接相关。论文未使用引力透镜方法，也未涉及高红移星系动力学、多相气体或偏振等优先主题。作者不在核心作者列表中。因此，相关性中等偏低。
recommendation.topic_fit: 部分匹配：论文主题为分子气体与恒星形成关系，与用户兴趣中的分子气体、恒星形成率等关键词有重叠，但用户更关注高红移（宇宙正午）和强引力透镜星系，而本论文聚焦邻近星系，红移不匹配。
recommendation.method_fit: 不匹配：论文使用CO多跃迁观测和MCMC拟合，未涉及引力透镜、高分辨率动力学或偏振测量等用户核心方法。
recommendation.author_fit: 不匹配：作者Victoria G. G. Samboco和Ryan P. Keenan不在用户的核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中等：论文通过多跃迁CO观测约束K-S关系的密度依赖性，有一定新意，但邻近星系类似研究较多，创新性有限。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文研究邻近星系，红移较低，与用户主要关注的高红移（宇宙正午）星系和强引力透镜研究领域偏离较大。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 恒星形成率面密度与星系中分子气体面密度之间的关系是理解星系演化的关键。为了研究分子Kennicutt-Schmidt (K-S) 关系及其对气体密度的依赖性，我们分析了来自AMISS巡天的一个由36个近邻星系组成的均匀样本，重点关注CO(1-0)、CO(2-1)和CO(3-2)跃迁，这些跃迁追踪了逐渐更致密和更温暖的分子气体。通过使用结合分箱与马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛 (MCMC) 拟合的统计方法，我们推导了每个跃迁的 $\Sigma_{\mathrm{SFR}}$-$\Sigma_{\mathrm{CO}}$ 关系的斜率、弥散和截距。我们发现CO(1-0)、CO(2-1)和CO(3-2)的幂律斜率分别为1.26、1.14和1.07，这与在更高J跃迁处恒星形成关系趋于更线性的趋势一致。这种行为支持了更致密气体与当前恒星形成有更直接联系的观点，并且与先前发现的HCN或高J CO光度与整体SFR之间近线性相关的结果一致。观测到的趋势表明，气体与SFR体密度之间存在幂律指数约为1.5的潜在关系，表明在更致密环境中恒星形成效率增强。这些发现强调了稠密气体在调控恒星形成中的关键作用，并突显了在不同环境中解释K-S关系时示踪剂选择和激发条件的重要性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，稠密气体在调控恒星形成中起着关键作用，强调了在解释不同环境中的K-S关系时，示踪剂选择和激发条件的重要性。这些发现深化了对星系中恒星形成过程的理解。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The distribution of our galaxy sample in stellar mass and SFR. Our full sample of 36 galaxies is represented by blue boxes. Black outlines denote the subsample of massive, star-forming galaxies (Stellar Mass \(\geq 10^{10}\) M ⊙ , SFR \(\geq 1\) M ⊙ yr -1 ) used at points in this work. These are sources detected in CO(1–0), CO(2–1), and CO(3–2). The gray region represents the star forming galaxy main sequence (Speagle et al. , 2014 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：我们的星系样本在恒星质量与SFR中的分布。我们的完整36个星系样本用蓝色方框表示。黑色轮廓表示在本工作中某些地方使用的大质量恒星形成星系子样本（恒星质量 \(\geq 10^{10}\) M ⊙ ，SFR \(\geq 1\) M ⊙ yr -1 ）。这些是在CO(1–0)、CO(2–1)和CO(3–2)中探测到的源。灰色区域代表恒星形成星系主序（Speagle et al. , 2014 ）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Relationship between SFR surface density ( \(\Sigma_{\text{SFR}}\) ) and molecular gas surface density ( \(\Sigma_{\text{CO}}\) ) for the full galaxy sample, as traced by CO(1–0) (left panel), CO(2–1) (middle panel), and CO(3–2) (right panel). The Black dashed line indicates the best-fitting power law relation, and the thin red lines show 100 randomly selected fits from the MCMC chain. Individual galaxies (black circles) are used in the fit. The gray circles represents the low-mass and low-SFR galaxies that are excluded to form our subsample shown in Figure 3
figures.caption_zh: 图2：完整星系样本的SFR面密度 ( \(\Sigma_{\text{SFR}}\) ) 与分子气体面密度 ( \(\Sigma_{\text{CO}}\) ) 之间的关系，分别由CO(1–0)（左图）、CO(2–1)（中图）和CO(3–2)（右图）示踪。黑色虚线表示最佳拟合幂律关系，细红线表示从MCMC链中随机选取的100个拟合。单个星系（黑色圆圈）用于拟合。灰色圆圈表示被排除以形成图3所示子样本的低质量和低SFR星系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: SFR surface density as a function of molecular gas surface density for a subsample excluding low-mass and low-SFR galaxies. Data are shown for CO(1–0) (left panel), CO(2–1) (middle panel), and CO(3–2) (right panel). Individual galaxies (black circles) are fit with the black dashed line. Blue squares (binned data) are shown for illustrative purposes.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：排除低质量和低SFR星系后的子样本中，SFR面密度作为分子气体面密度的函数。数据分别显示为CO(1–0)（左图）、CO(2–1)（中图）和CO(3–2)（右图）。单个星系（黑色圆圈）用黑色虚线拟合。蓝色方块（分箱数据）用于说明目的。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Joint distribution of K–S slopes for the CO(1–0) and CO(3–2) lines across 50,000 bootstrap realizations of our data. In each realization the observed quantities (SFR, CO luminosities, and half-light radius) were perturbed according to their measurement uncertainties, and the K–S relation was re-fitted using orthogonal distance regression (ODR). The contours indicate the \(68\%\) (solid) and \(95\%\) (dashed) highest-density regions of the bootstrap distribution. The red dashed line marks the equality relation \(\alpha_{{CO(1-0)}}=\alpha_{{CO(3-2)}}\) . Realizations below this line correspond to \(\alpha_{{CO(1-0)}}>\alpha_{{CO(3-2)}}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：在数据的50,000次自助法实现中，CO(1–0)和CO(3–2)谱线的K–S斜率联合分布。在每次实现中，观测量（SFR、CO光度和半光半径）根据其测量不确定度进行扰动，并使用正交距离回归 (ODR) 重新拟合K–S关系。等高线表示自助法分布的 \(68\%\)（实线）和 \(95\%\)（虚线）最高密度区域。红色虚线标记等式关系 \(\alpha_{{CO(1-0)}}=\alpha_{{CO(3-2)}}\) 。此线以下的实现对应于 \(\alpha_{{CO(1-0)}}>\alpha_{{CO(3-2)}}\) 。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Observed molecular Kennicutt-Schmidt (K–S) index as a function of CO transition from CO(1–0) to CO(4-3). The shaded regions represent theoretical predictions from Narayanan et al. ( 2011 ) for different indices of the underlying (volumetric) SFR density-molecular gas density relation: \(N=2\) (green), \(N=1.5\) (orange), and \(N=1\) (blue). The blue star markers correspond to our data. The remaining data points represent different fitting methods: bisector (squares), OLS (circles), and MCMC + ODR (stars). Filled markers indicate unresolved sources, open markers denote resolved sources, and red markers represent high-redshift sources. Our observed K–S index decreases with increasing CO transition and generally falls in the range of the \(N=1.5\) model.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：观测到的分子Kennicutt-Schmidt (K–S) 指数作为从CO(1–0)到CO(4-3)的CO跃迁的函数。阴影区域表示来自Narayanan et al. ( 2011 ) 对于潜在（体积）SFR密度-分子气体密度关系不同指数的理论预测：\(N=2\)（绿色）、\(N=1.5\)（橙色）和 \(N=1\)（蓝色）。蓝色星形标记对应我们的数据。其余数据点代表不同的拟合方法：等分线（方块）、OLS（圆圈）和MCMC + ODR（星形）。实心标记表示未分辨源，空心标记表示已分辨源，红色标记表示高红移源。我们观测到的K–S指数随着CO跃迁增加而减小，并且通常落在 \(N=1.5\) 模型的范围内。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Comparison of molecular K–S law slopes and fitting methods across different CO transitions reported in this work (matched galaxy sample in CO(1–0), CO(2–1), and CO(3–2)) and previous studies using varying CO lines and galaxy samples. The columns are (1) the reference for the reported molecular K–S slope, (2) whether the fit was performed using resolved regions of galaxies or galaxy-integrated values, (3) the (approximate) redshift of the sample used, (4) the CO line used, (5) the number of individual galaxies in the sample (for resolved studies the number of data points being fit is higher), (6) the slope of the molecular K–S relation and its uncertainty (when available), and (7) the fitting method used to derive the K–S slope.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：本工作（在CO(1–0)、CO(2–1)和CO(3–2)中匹配的星系样本）以及先前使用不同CO谱线和星系样本的研究中，不同CO跃迁的分子K–S定律斜率与拟合方法的比较。各列分别为：(1) 所报告分子K–S斜率的参考文献，(2) 拟合是针对星系已分辨区域还是星系积分值进行的，(3) 所用样本的（近似）红移，(4) 所用CO谱线，(5) 样本中单个星系的数量（对于已分辨研究，拟合的数据点数量更高），(6) 分子K–S关系的斜率及其不确定度（如有），以及 (7) 用于推导K–S斜率的拟合方法。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Slope, intrinsic scatter, and intercept f the molecular Kennicutt–Schmidt relation for the full and subsample galaxy sets. The relation fitted is \(\log(\Sigma_{SFR})=\alpha\,\log(\Sigma_{CO})+\log C\) , where \(\Sigma_{SFR}\) and \(\Sigma_{CO}\) have units of \({M}_{\odot}\,{yr}^{-1}\,{kpc}^{-2}\) and \(({K\,km\,s}^{-1}{\,pc}^{2})\,{kpc}^{-2}\) respectively. Symmetric uncertainties are the mean of upper and lower bounds.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：完整星系集和子样本星系集的分子Kennicutt–Schmidt关系的斜率、固有弥散和截距。拟合的关系为 \(\log(\Sigma_{SFR})=\alpha\,\log(\Sigma_{CO})+\log C\) ，其中 \(\Sigma_{SFR}\) 和 \(\Sigma_{CO}\) 的单位分别为 \({M}_{\odot}\,{yr}^{-1}\,{kpc}^{-2}\) 和 \(({K\,km\,s}^{-1}{\,pc}^{2})\,{kpc}^{-2}\) 。对称不确定度为上下限的平均值。

title: Joining forces: 30 years optical monitoring of the Einstein Cross
comment: Accepted to A&A; 18 pages, 6 long tables (Tables C.1-C.6) are available at the CDS
summary: We present an extended optical monitoring of the quadruply-imaged gravitationally lensed quasar QSO 2237+0305, the Einstein Cross, including observations from different observatories in both hemispheres and using a new photometric technique. This technique uses a region far enough from the lens system to determine accurately the sky background level, and minimises contamination from the lensing galaxy by combining analytical and numerical modeling of its structure. The resulting light curves of the four quasar images describe variations across practically the entire optical spectrum and span about 9000 days in the $VRI$ bands. The multi-band microlensing variability is captured with an unprecedented level of detail, and a preliminary microlensing analysis reveals an almost linear scaling of source radius with wavelength, providing direct evidence for the wavelength-dependent structure of the region contributing to optical passband fluxes. Specifically, assuming a mean microlens mass $\langle M \rangle$ = 0.3 $\rm{M_{\odot}}$ and concentric Gaussian sources that move according to the velocity distribution peaks (speed and direction) reported in a previous microlensing analysis, we find that the half-light radius of the $g$-band source is 9.6 $\pm$ 2.7 lt-day and the size of the sources grows with wavelength with a power-law index of $α$ = 0.94 $\pm$ 0.05. We conclude that these long-term light curves set stringent empirical constraints on models of quasar emission and microlensing physics.

AI.tldr: 对爱因斯坦十字引力透镜类星体QSO 2237+0305进行了扩展光学监测，开发了新的测光技术，获得了四幅图像在VRI波段约9000天的光变曲线，通过微引力透镜分析揭示了类星体发射区大小随波长变化的规律。
AI.motivation: 通过长期监测引力透镜类星体QSO 2237+0305，利用微引力透镜效应研究类星体发射区的物理结构，特别是其大小随波长的变化关系，为类星体发射模型和微引力透镜物理提供经验约束。
AI.method: 使用南北半球多个天文台的观测数据，开发新的测光技术：在远离透镜系统的区域确定精确的天空背景水平，结合解析和数值建模最小化透镜星系的污染。在VRI波段获得了四幅类星体图像约9000天的光变曲线，通过微引力透镜分析研究发射区大小。
AI.result: 获得了前所未有的多波段微引力透镜光变细节，发现类星体发射区大小随波长几乎线性增长：g波段半光半径约为9.6±2.7光天，大小随波长的幂律指数α=0.94±0.05。这直接证明了光学波段通量贡献区的波长依赖性结构。
AI.conclusion: 这些长期光变曲线为类星体发射模型和微引力透镜物理提供了严格的实证约束，证实了类星体发射区大小随波长变化的规律，为理解类星体中心区域物理结构提供了重要观测证据。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究引力透镜类星体QSO 2237+0305（爱因斯坦十字）的微引力透镜效应，主题与用户Zotero画像中的'lens'、'lensing'等关键词匹配。然而，用户的核心兴趣是星系-星系强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学和星际介质，而本文聚焦于类星体微引力透镜和发射区大小随波长的变化，属于活动星系核（AGN）物理范畴，与用户主要研究领域（高红移星系、尘埃、致密气体、暗物质等）重叠有限。作者列表中无用户核心作者。因此，虽然涉及引力透镜，但科学问题和方法与用户主要兴趣方向偏离较大，评分较低。
recommendation.topic_fit: 中等。论文主题为引力透镜类星体微引力透镜，与用户画像中的'lens'、'lensing'关键词匹配，但用户核心兴趣是星系-星系强引力透镜和高红移星系，而非类星体微透镜。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。论文采用光学测光和微引力透镜建模，用户主要使用高分辨率光谱、干涉成像（如ALMA、JWST）研究星系动力学和星际介质，方法差异大。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。作者列表中无用户核心作者（如daizhong liu、jianhang chen、reinhard genzel等）。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 低。论文的长期光变监测和微透镜分析在类星体领域有创新，但与用户关注的高红移星系动力学、尘埃和致密气体等前沿问题关联弱。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文聚焦类星体微引力透镜和AGN物理，与用户主要兴趣（高红移星系、星系-星系强引力透镜、星际介质）偏离较大，且方法（光学测光）和作者均不匹配。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了对四重成像引力透镜类星体QSO 2237+0305（爱因斯坦十字）的扩展光学监测，包括来自南北半球不同天文台的观测，并采用了一种新的测光技术。该技术利用距离透镜系统足够远的区域来精确确定天空背景水平，并通过结合透镜星系结构的解析和数值建模，最小化来自透镜星系的污染。由此得到的四个类星体像的光变曲线描述了几乎整个光学光谱范围内的变化，并在$VRI$波段跨越约9000天。多波段微引力透镜变率以前所未有的细节水平被捕捉，初步的微引力透镜分析揭示了源半径与波长之间近乎线性的标度关系，为光学通带通量贡献区域随波长变化的结构提供了直接证据。具体而言，假设平均微透镜质量$\langle M \rangle$ = 0.3 $\rm{M_{\odot}}$，且同心高斯源根据先前微引力透镜分析中报告的速度分布峰值（速度和方向）运动，我们发现$g$波段源的半光半径为9.6 $\pm$ 2.7光日，且源的大小随波长增长，幂律指数为$α$ = 0.94 $\pm$ 0.05。我们得出结论，这些长期光变曲线为类星体发射模型和微引力透镜物理设定了严格的实证约束。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，这些长期光变曲线为类星体发射模型和微引力透镜物理提供了严格的实证约束，证实了类星体发射区大小随波长变化的规律，为理解类星体中心区域物理结构提供了重要观测证据。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Residual light distributions in 20 \(r\) -band sub-frames. These sub-frames are part of frames taken with the IO:O camera of the LT in good seeing conditions and show well-structured extra-stellar residues in the region occupied by the lensing galaxy (see main text).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：20个\(r\)波段子帧中的残余光分布。这些子帧是LT的IO:O相机在良好视宁度条件下拍摄的帧的一部分，显示了透镜星系所在区域中结构良好的星外残余（见正文）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Lensing galaxy model from the LT/IO:O/ \(r\) -band best frames. Left panel: Numerical component in a square sub-frame of 256 pixels on a side. A 32 \(\times\) 32 pixel green square is plotted for comparison. Right panel: The sum of the analytical and numerical components.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：来自LT/IO:O/\(r\)波段最佳帧的透镜星系模型。左图：边长为256像素的方形子帧中的数值分量。绘制了一个32 \(\times\) 32像素的绿色方块作为比较。右图：解析分量和数值分量的和。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: \(\chi^{2}\) in the central 32 \(\times\) 32 pixel square containing the four quasar images when modelling MT/ \(R\) -band frames. The red squares correspond to the new photometric scheme and the grey circles are obtained from our previous photometric method (see main text).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在建模MT/\(R\)波段帧时，包含四个类星体像的中心32 \(\times\) 32像素方形区域内的\(\chi^{2}\)。红色方块对应新的测光方案，灰色圆圈来自我们之前的测光方法（见正文）。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Number of observing epochs (nights) for each band and telescope.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：每个波段和望远镜的观测历元（夜晚）数量。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Updated GLENDAMA light curves of QSO 2237+0305 . We added new data resulting from monitoring with the LT over 2020 \(-\) 2024. Top panel: \(g\) -band magnitudes. Bottom panel: \(r\) -band magnitudes.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：QSO 2237+0305更新的GLENDAMA光变曲线。我们添加了2020 \(-\) 2024年期间使用LT监测得到的新数据。上图：\(g\)波段星等。下图：\(r\)波段星等。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Updated \(B\) -band ( top panel ) and \(V\) -band ( bottom panel ) light curves.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：更新的\(B\)波段（上图）和\(V\)波段（下图）光变曲线。

figures.caption_zh: 图6：更新的\(R\)波段（上图）和\(I\)波段（下图）光变曲线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Difference light curves in the \(BgVrRI\) bands. Squares with black borders draw the microlensing signals in the \(V\) band (see main text). Details of the DLCs in five well-sampled observing seasons are shown in Appendix B .
figures.caption_zh: 图7：\(BgVrRI\)波段中的差分光变曲线。带黑色边框的方块绘制了\(V\)波段中的微引力透镜信号（见正文）。五个采样良好的观测季节的DLC细节见附录B。

title: What Heats the Dense Gas in the Galactic Center?
comment: Accepted for publication in ApJ. 22 pages, 10 figures, 3 tables
summary: Previous studies using p-H$_2$CO $J=3$--$2$ transitions at 218 GHz suggested widespread high-temperature gas exceeding 60 K and even 100 K in the CMZ, with heating mechanisms possibly related to cosmic rays or turbulent dissipation. However, at temperatures above 100 K, p-H$_2$CO $J=3$--$2$ line emission may lead to significant overestimates of kinetic temperature. This study combines o-H$_2$CO $J=5$--$4$ data from JCMT with p-H$_2$CO $J=3$--$2$ data from APEX to analyze three molecular clouds (The Brick, Sgr A1, and Sgr A2) with high temperatures. We used the non-LTE radiative transfer code RADEX to model spectral lines and constrain physical parameters with multiple line ratios, obtaining more reliable kinetic temperatures. Our results show that the previously reported extreme temperatures ($>100$ K) based on p-H$_2$CO $J=3$--$2$ line ratios are revised downward, with the average kinetic temperatures now constrained to 84--95 K using o-H$_2$CO $J=5$--$4$ line ratios, indicating systematic overestimation in the earlier studies. Further analysis reveals that the relationship between temperature and gas line width aligns more closely with predictions from models incorporating both high cosmic ray ionization rate and turbulent heating, suggesting that these molecular clouds are likely heated by a combination of cosmic-ray and turbulent dissipation mechanisms.

AI.tldr: 本研究结合o-H₂CO J=5-4和p-H₂CO J=3-2谱线数据，修正了先前仅使用p-H₂CO J=3-2谱线对银河系中心分子云温度的高估，发现实际平均温度为84-95K，而非之前报道的>100K，并证实加热机制是宇宙射线和湍流耗散共同作用。
AI.motivation: 先前研究使用p-H₂CO J=3-2谱线（218 GHz）表明银河系中心分子云存在广泛的高温气体（>60-100K），但该谱线在温度超过100K时可能导致对动理温度的高估。需要更可靠的温度测量方法来准确理解加热机制。
AI.method: 结合JCMT的o-H₂CO J=5-4数据和APEX的p-H₂CO J=3-2数据，分析三个高温分子云（The Brick、Sgr A1和Sgr A2）。使用非LTE辐射转移代码RADEX建模谱线，通过多谱线比约束物理参数，获得更可靠的动理温度。
AI.result: 先前基于p-H₂CO J=3-2谱线比报告的极端温度（>100K）被向下修正，使用o-H₂CO J=5-4谱线比约束的平均动理温度为84-95K，表明早期研究存在系统性高估。温度与气体线宽的关系更符合高宇宙射线电离率和湍流加热模型的预测。
AI.conclusion: 银河系中心分子云的实际温度低于先前估计，加热机制很可能是宇宙射线和湍流耗散共同作用的结果。多谱线分析方法提供了更可靠的温度约束，有助于准确理解这些极端环境中的物理过程。

recommendation.reason: 论文研究银河系中心分子云（CMZ）的加热机制，涉及致密气体和分子谱线，与用户兴趣画像中的'dense gas'和'molecular'关键词有部分匹配。然而，用户的核心兴趣是强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学和运动学，而本论文聚焦于银河系中心（低红移）的星际介质物理，与用户的主要研究方向（高红移、强透镜）严重偏离。论文未涉及任何引力透镜、高红移星系或用户核心作者。因此，尽管存在关键词重叠，但科学问题和方法与用户兴趣不匹配，评分较低。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。论文主题为银河系中心分子云加热，与用户主要兴趣（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学）不匹配。仅'致密气体'和'分子'等泛关键词有重叠。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。使用JCMT和APEX的谱线观测及RADEX辐射转移建模，与用户常用的强透镜建模、高红移积分场光谱（如SINFONI、ALMA）等方法不同。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。论文作者（Zhenyi Yue, Yiping Ao等）均不在用户的核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中。论文修正了先前对银河系中心温度的过高估计，并确认了宇宙射线和湍流加热机制，在银河系天体物理领域有一定新意，但与用户的高红移透镜研究无关。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文研究银河系中心（低红移）的分子云加热，与用户核心兴趣（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、宇宙正午）严重偏离。无透镜、无高红移、无核心作者。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 先前利用218 GHz的p-H₂CO J=3–2跃迁的研究表明，银河系中心分子云（CMZ）中普遍存在超过60 K甚至100 K的高温气体，其加热机制可能与宇宙射线或湍流耗散有关。然而，当温度超过100 K时，p-H₂CO J=3–2谱线发射可能导致对动力学温度的显著高估。本研究结合JCMT的o-H₂CO J=5–4数据和APEX的p-H₂CO J=3–2数据，分析了三个高温分子云（The Brick、Sgr A1和Sgr A2）。我们使用非局部热动平衡辐射传输代码RADEX对谱线进行建模，并利用多个谱线比约束物理参数，获得了更可靠的动力学温度。结果表明，先前基于p-H₂CO J=3–2谱线比报告的极端温度（>100 K）被下调，使用o-H₂CO J=5–4谱线比后，平均动力学温度被约束在84–95 K之间，表明早期研究存在系统性高估。进一步分析显示，温度与气体线宽之间的关系更符合同时包含高宇宙射线电离率和湍流加热的模型预测，表明这些分子云很可能由宇宙射线和湍流耗散共同加热。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：银河系中心分子云的实际温度低于先前估计，加热机制很可能是宇宙射线和湍流耗散共同作用的结果。多谱线分析方法提供了更可靠的温度约束，有助于准确理解这些极端环境中的物理过程。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: H 2 CO Transitions Used in This Study a a footnotetext: Blended with CH 3 OH \(4_{22}\) – \(3_{12}\) ; not used in this study. b b footnotetext: These two transitions are blended into a single spectral feature and analyzed together.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：本研究中使用的H₂CO跃迁 a a脚注：与CH₃OH \(4_{22}\) – \(3_{12}\) 混合；未在本研究中使用。 b b脚注：这两个跃迁混合成一个单一谱特征并一起分析。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Integrated intensity maps of the H 2 CO \(J=5-4\) transitions for the three targeted molecular clouds after baseline subtraction and masking. Panels (a–c): intensity maps of the o-H 2 CO \(J=5_{15}\) – \(4_{14}\) transition. Panels (d–f): intensity maps of the combined o-H 2 CO \(J=5_{33}\) – \(4_{32}\) and \(J=5_{32}\) – \(4_{31}\) transitions. For each subpanel, the velocity integration range is indicated above the map. The contours in each panel correspond to 30%, 60%, and 90% of the peak integrated intensity.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：三个目标分子云在基线扣除和掩膜后H₂CO \(J=5-4\) 跃迁的积分强度图。面板(a–c)：o-H₂CO \(J=5_{15}\) – \(4_{14}\) 跃迁的强度图。面板(d–f)：组合的o-H₂CO \(J=5_{33}\) – \(4_{32}\) 和 \(J=5_{32}\) – \(4_{31}\) 跃迁的强度图。每个子面板上方标明了速度积分范围。每个面板中的等高线对应峰值积分强度的30%、60%和90%。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Spatial distribution of the o-H 2 CO line intensity ratios, \(R\) , for the three target molecular clouds. Top row (a–c): Ratio \(R_{5-4}\) derived from the original JCMT data for The Brick, Sgr A1, and Sgr A2, respectively. Middle row (d–f): Ratio \(R_{5-4}\) for the same clouds after smoothing the JCMT data to the APEX resolution. Bottom row (g–i): Ratio \(R_{3-2}\) from the APEX data (A. Ginsburg et al., 2016 ) . The color bar indicates the value of the respective ratio, with the scale restricted to the range 0–0.5 for uniform comparison across all panels.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：三个目标分子云的o-H₂CO谱线强度比 \(R\) 的空间分布。顶行(a–c)：分别来自原始JCMT数据的The Brick、Sgr A1和Sgr A2的比值 \(R_{5-4}\) 。中间行(d–f)：将JCMT数据平滑至APEX分辨率后相同云的比值 \(R_{5-4}\) 。底行(g–i)：来自APEX数据的比值 \(R_{3-2}\) （A. Ginsburg等人，2016）。色标表示相应比值的数值，范围限制在0–0.5以在所有面板间进行统一比较。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Distribution of the kinetic temperature ( \(T_{{kin}}\) ) across the three target molecular clouds under different observational constraints. The color of each pixel corresponds to the kinetic temperature, as indicated by the shared color bar (right), with values restricted to an upper limit of 160 \({K}\) where the majority of the data lie. Pixels with temperatures exceeding 160 \({K}\) are marked with black plus signs (+). Columns, from left to right, represent: The Brick (G0.253+0.016), Sgr A1, and Sgr A2. Rows, from top to bottom, show temperatures derived from: the original JCMT \(J=5\) – \(4\) data alone; the smoothed JCMT \(J=5\) – \(4\) data alone; the APEX \(J=3\) – \(2\) data alone (A. Ginsburg et al., 2016 ) ; and the joint constraints using both smoothed JCMT \(J=5\) – \(4\) and APEX \(J=3\) – \(2\) data.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在不同观测约束下三个目标分子云中动力学温度（ \(T_{{kin}}\) ）的分布。每个像素的颜色对应动力学温度，由共享色标（右侧）指示，数值限制在大多数数据所在的160 \({K}\) 上限内。温度超过160 \({K}\) 的像素用黑色加号（+）标记。列从左到右依次为：The Brick (G0.253+0.016)、Sgr A1和Sgr A2。行从上到下依次显示由以下数据导出的温度：仅原始JCMT \(J=5\) – \(4\) 数据；仅平滑后的JCMT \(J=5\) – \(4\) 数据；仅APEX \(J=3\) – \(2\) 数据（A. Ginsburg等人，2016）；以及同时使用平滑后的JCMT \(J=5\) – \(4\) 和APEX \(J=3\) – \(2\) 数据的联合约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Parameter space analysis for two selected positions in The Brick (G0.253+0.016) at ( \(l=0.268^{\circ}\) , \(b=0.028^{\circ}\) ) (top row) and ( \(l=0.242^{\circ}\) , \(b=0.006^{\circ}\) ) (bottom row). Panels (a) and (c) show column density–temperature slices at fixed H 2 densities (indicated above each panel), while panels (b) and (d) show density–temperature slices at fixed p-H 2 CO column densities (indicated above each panel). The grayscale background represents the likelihood distribution from the joint constraints of the \(J=3\) – \(2\) and \(J=5\) – \(4\) transitions at \({OPR}=3\) , with darker shades indicating higher likelihood. Colored contours show model predictions for different OPR values (blue: \(J=3\) – \(2\) constraints; red: \(J=5\) – \(4\) constraints). Line styles distinguish the type of constraint (solid: line ratios; dashed: line intensities). For clarity, only constraints from the \(3_{03}\) – \(2_{02}\) and \(5_{15}\) – \(4_{14}\) transitions are visualized here; the full likelihood distribution, however, incorporates additional constraints from the \(3_{21}\) – \(2_{20}\) and \(5_{33}\) – \(4_{32}\) & \(5_{32}\) – \(4_{31}\) transitions. Contour lines for different OPR values are distinguished by color intensity, ranging from light ( \({OPR}=1\) ) to bold ( \({OPR}=3\) ). Black dashed lines indicate the \(1\sigma\) observational uncertainty on the line ratios, and black “ \(\times\) ” symbols mark the expected parameter values for OPR = 3. Observed line ratios and main-beam temperatures for each position are provided by the panels on the right hand side.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：The Brick (G0.253+0.016)中两个选定位置在 ( \(l=0.268^{\circ}\) , \(b=0.028^{\circ}\) )（顶行）和 ( \(l=0.242^{\circ}\) , \(b=0.006^{\circ}\) )（底行）的参数空间分析。面板(a)和(c)显示在固定H₂密度（每个面板上方标明）下的柱密度–温度切片，而面板(b)和(d)显示在固定p-H₂CO柱密度（每个面板上方标明）下的密度–温度切片。灰度背景表示在 \({OPR}=3\) 时 \(J=3\) – \(2\) 和 \(J=5\) – \(4\) 跃迁联合约束的似然分布，较暗色调表示较高似然。彩色等高线显示不同OPR值的模型预测（蓝色：\(J=3\) – \(2\) 约束；红色：\(J=5\) – \(4\) 约束）。线型区分约束类型（实线：谱线比；虚线：谱线强度）。为清晰起见，此处仅显示来自 \(3_{03}\) – \(2_{02}\) 和 \(5_{15}\) – \(4_{14}\) 跃迁的约束；然而，完整似然分布还包含来自 \(3_{21}\) – \(2_{20}\) 和 \(5_{33}\) – \(4_{32}\) 及 \(5_{32}\) – \(4_{31}\) 跃迁的额外约束。不同OPR值的等高线通过颜色强度区分，从浅色（ \({OPR}=1\) ）到深色（ \({OPR}=3\) ）。黑色虚线表示谱线比的 \(1\sigma\) 观测不确定性，黑色“ \(\times\) ”符号标记OPR = 3时的预期参数值。每个位置的观测谱线比和主波束温度由右侧面板提供。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Kinetic temperatures and uncertainties under different constraints a a footnotetext: ”Err” values are the mean 1 \(\sigma\) measurement errors per pixel. b b footnotetext: Joint constraints using both smoothed JCMT \(J=5\) – \(4\) and APEX \(J=3\) – \(2\) data.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：不同约束下的动力学温度及其不确定性 a a脚注：”Err”值为每个像素的平均1 \(\sigma\) 测量误差。 b b脚注：使用平滑后的JCMT \(J=5\) – \(4\) 和APEX \(J=3\) – \(2\) 数据的联合约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Spatial distribution of the molecular hydrogen number density ( \(n_{{H_{2}}}\) ) and its uncertainty for the three target molecular clouds. Densities are derived from joint constraints of the H 2 CO \(J=3\) – \(2\) and \(J=5\) – \(4\) transitions, assuming \({OPR}=3\) . Upper panels (a–c): Density maps of The Brick (G0.253+0.016), Sgr A1, and Sgr A2 (left to right), displayed on a logarithmic scale. Lower panels (d–f): Corresponding uncertainty maps ( \(\Delta\log_{10}[n({H_{2}})]\) ) for each cloud. The color bars on the right indicate the density (upper panels) and uncertainty (lower panels) values. Pixels with unreliable density estimates ( \(\Delta\log_{10}[n({H_{2}})]>1.5\) or the upper bound reaching the prior boundary at \(\log_{10}[n({H_{2}})]=7\) ) are marked with “x”. The label in the upper-left corner of each density panel gives the percentage of pixels classified as unreliable.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：三个目标分子云的分子氢数密度（ \(n_{{H_{2}}}\) ）及其不确定性的空间分布。密度由H₂CO \(J=3\) – \(2\) 和 \(J=5\) – \(4\) 跃迁的联合约束导出，假设 \({OPR}=3\) 。上面板(a–c)：The Brick (G0.253+0.016)、Sgr A1和Sgr A2（从左到右）的密度图，以对数标度显示。下面板(d–f)：每个云对应的不确定性图（ \(\Delta\log_{10}[n({H_{2}})]\) ）。右侧色标指示密度（上面板）和不确定性（下面板）数值。密度估计不可靠的像素（ \(\Delta\log_{10}[n({H_{2}})]>1.5\) 或上界达到先验边界 \(\log_{10}[n({H_{2}})]=7\) ）用“x”标记。每个密度面板左上角的标签给出了被分类为不可靠的像素百分比。

figures.caption_en: Table 3: Number densities and their uncertainties under different constraints a a footnotetext: ”Err” values are the mean 1 \(\sigma\) measurement errors per pixel. b b footnotetext: Joint constraints using both smoothed JCMT \(J=5\) – \(4\) and APEX \(J=3\) – \(2\) data. c c footnotetext: All density values are logarithms (base 10) of the number density in units of cm -3 , i.e., \(\log_{10}[n({H}_{2})/{cm}^{-3}]\) .
figures.caption_zh: 表3：不同约束下的数密度及其不确定性 a a脚注：”Err”值为每个像素的平均1 \(\sigma\) 测量误差。 b b脚注：使用平滑后的JCMT \(J=5\) – \(4\) 和APEX \(J=3\) – \(2\) 数据的联合约束。 c c脚注：所有密度值均为数密度（单位cm⁻³）的对数（以10为底），即 \(\log_{10}[n({H}_{2})/{cm}^{-3}]\) 。

title: The k-MENDEL sample of local analogs to reionization galaxies. Spectral identification of EELGs and properties of green peas in DESI
comment: 21 pages (incl. appendix), 15 figures. Submitted to A&A
summary: Low-mass galaxies with intense starbursts exhibit spectra dominated by extreme nebular emission and faint stellar continua. These extreme emission-line galaxies (EELGs) are key laboratories to study star formation, feedback, and ionizing photon escape in low-metallicity environments. We exploit the DESI survey to assemble the k-Means of Extreme Nebulae from DEsi outLiers (k-MENDEL), a statistically robust sample of ~16,000 EELGs at 0.01 < z < 0.96 selected via automatic k-means classification. Using SED fitting and Te-based metallicities, we characterize EELGs including "blueberry" and "green pea" galaxies, spanning stellar masses of 10^6-10^10 Msun and SFRs of 0.1-100 Msun/yr. k-MENDEL extends previous SDSS samples toward higher redshifts and lower metallicities (12+log(O/H) ~ 7.0-8.5). EELGs lie systematically above the star-forming main sequence, with sSFRs up to ~100 Gyr^-1. They follow a shallower mass-metallicity relation offset by 0.3-0.5 dex from local relations, closely resembling young galaxies observed with JWST at z > 3-10. The large intrinsic metallicity scatter, even after projecting along the fundamental metallicity relation, indicates strong departures from simple "bathtub" models, suggesting massive inflows of metal-poor gas followed by strong feedback. While ~6% of the sample shows AGN-like signatures, the most extreme star-forming systems reach high ionization (O32 ~ 5-60) comparable to confirmed Lyman-continuum emitters. Our results support the interpretation of EELGs as short-lived, non-equilibrium phases in the evolution of low-mass galaxies and highlight their importance as nearby analogs of galaxies likely driving cosmic reionization (Abridged).

AI.tldr: DESI巡天利用k-means分类构建了约16,000个极端发射线星系样本k-MENDEL，这些星系具有高强度恒星形成、低金属丰度和高电离特征，是研究早期星系演化和宇宙再电离的重要实验室。
AI.motivation: 极端发射线星系（EELGs）是研究低金属丰度环境下恒星形成、反馈机制和电离光子逃逸的关键实验室。传统SDSS样本在红移范围和金属丰度上有限，需要更大、更系统的样本来理解这些星系的物理特性及其在星系演化中的作用。
AI.method: 利用DESI巡天数据，通过自动k-means分类方法构建k-MENDEL样本，包含约16,000个EELGs。使用SED拟合和Te基金属丰度测量方法，对星系进行物理参数表征，包括"蓝莓"和"绿豌豆"星系类型。
AI.result: k-MENDEL样本扩展了红移范围（0.01<z<0.96）和金属丰度下限（12+log(O/H)~7.0-8.5）。EELGs位于恒星形成主序之上，具有高达~100 Gyr^-1的比恒星形成率。它们遵循更浅的质量-金属丰度关系，与JWST观测到的z>3-10年轻星系相似。约6%的样本显示AGN特征，最极端的恒星形成系统达到高电离状态（O32~5-60）。
AI.conclusion: EELGs代表低质量星系演化中的短暂非平衡阶段，是驱动宇宙再电离的星系的邻近类似体。金属丰度的大幅散射表明存在金属贫乏气体的大规模流入和强烈反馈，偏离简单的"浴缸"模型。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究低质量极端发射线星系（EELGs）作为再电离时期星系的近邻类似体，与用户主要兴趣（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体）无直接关联。虽然涉及JWST和恒星形成，但未使用引力透镜方法，也未聚焦于高红移星系动力学或核心作者。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低：论文主题为低红移EELGs和再电离类似体，与用户的高红移强引力透镜、星系动力学、多相气体等核心主题不匹配。
recommendation.method_fit: 低：使用DESI巡天光谱和k-means分类，未涉及引力透镜或高分辨率动力学建模。
recommendation.author_fit: 无：作者列表中无用户核心作者。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中：构建大样本EELGs有一定新意，但不在用户优先领域内。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文不涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、偏振或多相气体等用户优先主题，且属于低红移恒星形成星系研究，与用户兴趣画像偏差较大。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 低质量星系中的剧烈星暴事件会产生以极端星云发射线和微弱恒星连续谱为特征的光谱。这些极端发射线星系（EELGs）是研究低金属丰度环境中恒星形成、反馈和电离光子逃逸的关键实验室。我们利用DESI巡天，通过自动k均值分类构建了k-MENDEL样本，这是一个统计稳健的样本，包含约16,000个红移范围0.01 < z < 0.96的EELGs。通过SED拟合和基于电子温度（Te）的金属丰度测量，我们表征了包括“蓝莓”和“绿豌豆”星系在内的EELGs，其恒星质量范围为10^6-10^10 Msun，恒星形成率（SFR）为0.1-100 Msun/yr。k-MENDEL将先前的SDSS样本扩展至更高红移和更低金属丰度（12+log(O/H) ~ 7.0-8.5）。EELGs系统地位于恒星形成主序之上，比恒星形成率（sSFR）高达~100 Gyr^-1。它们遵循一条更平缓的质量-金属丰度关系，比局域关系偏移0.3-0.5 dex，与JWST在z > 3-10观测到的年轻星系非常相似。即使在沿基本金属丰度关系投影后，其内在金属丰度离散仍然很大，表明其严重偏离简单的“浴缸”模型，暗示存在贫金属气体的大规模流入以及随后的强烈反馈。虽然约6%的样本显示出类似活动星系核（AGN）的特征，但最极端的恒星形成系统达到了与已确认的莱曼连续谱发射体相当的高电离状态（O32 ~ 5-60）。我们的结果支持将EELGs解释为低质量星系演化中的短暂非平衡阶段，并强调了它们作为可能驱动宇宙再电离的星系的邻近类似体的重要性（摘要缩减版）。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，EELGs代表低质量星系演化中的短暂非平衡阶段，是驱动宇宙再电离的星系的邻近类似体。金属丰度的大幅散射表明存在金属贫乏气体的大规模流入和强烈反馈，偏离简单的"浴缸"模型。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: ( Left ) Rest-frame optical median stack spectra of the major (bottom) and minor (top) ASK classes. ( Right ) Median stack spectra of galaxies identified as outliers (see text for details). All spectra are normalized to the continuum level at \(\lambda\) 4800 Å and vertically shifted for clarity. Grey shaded regions indicate the spectral windows used for the ASK classification. Labels denote the number of galaxies contributing to each composite spectrum. A zoom-in of the blue wavelength range ( \(3800\) – \(4800\) Å) is shown in Fig. 13 .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：（左）主要（底部）和次要（顶部）ASK类别星系在静止坐标系下的光学中值叠加光谱。（右）被识别为离群值星系的中值叠加光谱（详见正文）。所有光谱均归一化至\(\lambda\) 4800 Å处的连续谱水平，并垂直偏移以便清晰显示。灰色阴影区域表示用于ASK分类的光谱窗口。标签表示构成每个复合光谱的星系数量。蓝色波长范围（\(3800\) – \(4800\) Å）的放大图见图13。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Distributions of emission-line equivalent widths for galaxies classified in major (ASK1-12) and minor (ASK13-15) ASK classes. For comparison, we also show galaxies belonging to ASK12, which represents the most extreme major class, and spectral outliers (ASK16-25). Equivalent widths are taken from the DESI-EDR value-added catalog of Zou et al. ( 2024 ) . Minor classes and outliers are clearly associated with progressively larger equivalent widths, illustrating that the ASK classification efficiently isolates galaxies with extreme nebular emission.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：主要（ASK1-12）和次要（ASK13-15）ASK类别中星系的发射线等值宽度分布。作为比较，我们还展示了属于ASK12（代表最极端的主要类别）以及光谱离群值（ASK16-25）的星系。等值宽度取自Zou等人（2024）的DESI-EDR增值星表。次要类别和离群值明显与逐渐增大的等值宽度相关，说明ASK分类能有效分离具有极端星云发射的星系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Maximum quality associated with major and minor ASK classes for galaxies in the low-redshift subsample used to define the ASK classification ( \(0.01<z\leq 0.25\) ). Each point represents one galaxy, showing the highest quality value among major classes (ASK1-12), \(Q_{max}\) (Major), versus that among minor classes (ASK13-15), \(Q_{max}\) (Minor). Colours indicate the ASK class providing the best spectral match, including outliers (ASK \(\geq\) 16). The solid black line marks the one-to-one relation. Galaxies located above this demarcation are preferentially associated with rare or extreme spectral classes and are therefore selected as EELG candidates.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：用于定义ASK分类的低红移子样本（\(0.01<z\leq 0.25\)）中，主要和次要ASK类别的最大质量值。每个点代表一个星系，显示主要类别（ASK1-12）中的最高质量值\(Q_{max}\)（主要）与次要类别（ASK13-15）中的最高质量值\(Q_{max}\)（次要）的关系。颜色表示提供最佳光谱匹配的ASK类别，包括离群值（ASK \(\geq\) 16）。实黑线标记一对一关系。位于此分界线之上的星系优先与罕见或极端光谱类别相关联，因此被选为EELG候选体。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Examples of DESI EELGs from the k-MENDEL sample. Legacy Survey DR10 color-composite images are shown for a representative subsample spanning a range of stellar masses, redshifts, and emission-line equivalent widths. Images are displayed with North up and East to the left, and each panel corresponds to a field of \(20\arcsec\times 20\arcsec\) . Most systems appear compact or nearly unresolved at DESI imaging resolution, consistent with intense star formation occurring in low-mass galaxies. In some cases, multiple bright clumps or disturbed morphologies are visible, suggestive of clumpy star formation or possible interactions.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：来自k-MENDEL样本的DESI EELGs示例。展示了代表性子样本的Legacy巡天DR10彩色合成图像，这些子样本覆盖了不同的恒星质量、红移和发射线等值宽度范围。图像显示为北向上、东向左，每个面板对应一个\(20\arcsec\times 20\arcsec\)的视场。大多数系统在DESI成像分辨率下表现为致密或几乎不可分辨，这与低质量星系中发生的剧烈恒星形成一致。在某些情况下，可以看到多个明亮团块或扭曲形态，暗示存在团块状恒星形成或可能的相互作用。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Example of spectrophotometric SED fitting with CIGALE for a representative EELG (DESI TARGETID 39633286554487272). Colored symbols show the synthetic medium-band photometric points derived from the DESI spectrum after convolution with box filters of 124 Å width, while the solid black curve indicates the best-fit model including stellar, nebular, and dust components. The fit illustrates the ability of the method to reproduce both the continuum shape and the contribution of strong emission lines in low signal-to-noise spectra.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：使用CIGALE对一个代表性EELG（DESI TARGETID 39633286554487272）进行分光光度SED拟合的示例。彩色符号表示从DESI光谱经124 Å宽度箱形滤波器卷积后得到的合成中带测光点，而实黑曲线表示包含恒星、星云和尘埃成分的最佳拟合模型。该拟合展示了该方法在低信噪比光谱中再现连续谱形状和强发射线贡献的能力。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Ionization diagnostic diagrams for the DESI EELG sample. Top panels: Classical BPT diagrams for the subsample at \(z ii ] \(\lambda 6583\) (left) and [S ii ] \(\lambda\lambda 6716,6731\) (right) are accessible. Solid, dashed, and dotted curves show the demarcation relations from Kewley et al. ( 2001 ) , Kauffmann et al. ( 2003 ) , and Xiao et al. ( 2018 ) , respectively. Symbols are colour-coded according to the \(O_{32}\) ratio, tracing variations in ionization parameter. Bottom left: O3H \(\gamma\) versus He ii \(\lambda 4686\) /H \(\beta\) diagram highlighting the location of high-ionization systems. Grey points indicate EELGs with S/N \( ii . The red dashed line shows the empirical demarcation adopted in this work to separate extreme ionization sources (see text). Bottom right: [O iii ] \(\lambda 5007\) /H \(\beta\) versus Ne3O2 diagnostic diagram. Green symbols indicate AGN candidates identified from composite ionization criteria, while blue symbols correspond to star-forming EELGs. The dashed red curve shows the empirical relation proposed by Feuillet et al. ( 2024 ) . In all panels, colour bars indicate line-ratio diagnostics sensitive to ionization conditions.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：DESI EELG样本的电离诊断图。上面板：子样本（\(z ii ] \(\lambda 6583\)（左）和[S ii ] \(\lambda\lambda 6716,6731\)（右）可获取时的经典BPT图。实线、虚线和点线分别表示Kewley等人（2001）、Kauffmann等人（2003）和Xiao等人（2018）的分界关系。符号颜色根据\(O_{32}\)比值编码，追踪电离参数的变化。左下：O3H \(\gamma\) 对He ii \(\lambda 4686\) /H \(\beta\) 图，突出高电离系统的位置。灰色点表示S/N \( ii 的EELGs。红色虚线表示本工作中用于分离极端电离源的经验分界线（详见正文）。右下：[O iii ] \(\lambda 5007\) /H \(\beta\) 对Ne3O2诊断图。绿色符号表示根据复合电离标准识别的AGN候选体，蓝色符号对应恒星形成EELGs。红色虚线曲线表示Feuillet等人（2024）提出的经验关系。在所有面板中，色条表示对电离条件敏感的线比诊断。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Median rest-frame composite spectrum of the k-MENDEL EELG sample after excluding sources consistent with AGN activity based on emission-line diagnostics (Sect. 5.1 ). The spectrum is shown in several wavelength intervals to highlight both nebular emission lines and stellar continuum features. Grey dashed vertical lines mark the spectral windows used for emission-line measurements, while red labels identify the main emission features and blue labels indicate prominent stellar absorption lines, following the notation described in Table 3 . The light-blue shaded region illustrates the underlying stellar continuum level. The upper panel shows the number of galaxies contributing to the stack as a function of rest-frame wavelength, reflecting the redshift-dependent spectral coverage of the DESI sample. The high signal-to-noise ratio of the stack allows the detection of weak stellar absorption features, revealing the presence of evolved stellar populations underlying the ongoing starburst activity.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：排除基于发射线诊断（第5.1节）与AGN活动一致的源后，k-MENDEL EELG样本的中值静止坐标系复合光谱。光谱以多个波长区间显示，以突出星云发射线和恒星连续谱特征。灰色虚线垂直线标记用于发射线测量的光谱窗口，红色标签标识主要发射特征，蓝色标签标识显著的恒星吸收线，遵循表3所述的符号。浅蓝色阴影区域表示底层恒星连续谱水平。上面板显示作为静止波长函数的构成叠加的星系数量，反映了DESI样本的红移相关光谱覆盖范围。叠加的高信噪比使得能够探测到微弱的恒星吸收特征，揭示了正在进行的星暴活动之下存在演化的恒星族群。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Distributions of physical and nebular properties for the k-MENDEL EELG sample. From left to right and top to bottom we show stellar mass, Balmer-based SFR, specific SFR, effective radius, nebular color excess \(E(B-V)\) , electron density \(n_{e}\) from [O ii ], electron temperature \(t_{e}\) from [O iii ], and oxygen abundance derived from the direct \(T_{e}\) method. Solid vertical lines indicate the median values of each distribution, while dashed lines mark the 16th and 84th percentiles. Annotated labels provide the corresponding percentile ranges. In the metallicity panel (bottom right), the shaded grey histogram represents HCm-based metallicities for EELGs without \(T_{e}\) measurements.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：k-MENDEL EELG样本的物理和星云性质分布。从左到右、从上到下依次显示恒星质量、基于巴尔默线的SFR、比SFR、有效半径、星云色余\(E(B-V)\)、来自[O ii ]的电子密度\(n_{e}\)、来自[O iii ]的电子温度\(t_{e}\)以及通过直接\(T_{e}\)方法得到的氧丰度。实垂直线表示每个分布的中值，虚线标记第16和第84百分位数。标注的标签提供相应的百分位数范围。在金属丰度面板（右下），灰色阴影直方图表示没有\(T_{e}\)测量的EELGs的HCm基金属丰度。
